properties.subject: Learn more about our updated Terms of Service

blocks.text:
![](https://ci3.googleusercontent.com/meips/ADKq_Na_BBdWw4xSS1_7W0tRI-DubxDZ-zMFzjRzsAmvUiqb-6gL7Jet5x7E0yEggz3waGJpU7WGwrwsKD6WnXyjJDfHE6ceVQ6TY7Dknt9OK4MdcewBpTNfNIxYzJ_R=s0-d-e1-ft#http://services.google.com/fh/files/emails/updated_google_logo_new.png)

dima.dxos@gmail.com

![](https://ci3.googleusercontent.com/meips/ADKq_Naedd9O5dZbKgg_VRWev0iVRw5A_EL23lSD0qHYIbzD6pPnIs0Ai0cJ54Fi_2fTkgOl3YQSZWL30kw3Wg8R5J0DMOfabuh7EfOe42pS0bQlPT2QpRpYKQNI6ii47FoiY8TQboIVxzeJ7p7-YldAya7DR5eOmXG5Wrk6xaELjg=s0-d-e1-ft#https://www.gstatic.com/identity/boq/policies/msa/utos_illustration-d3cb2a71970d5e9daf2e78a2ee367789.png)

Every couple of years, we update our **Terms of Service**. We wanted to let you know ahead of time that the next update will be on **July 30, 2026**.

These changes won’t affect the way you use our [services](https://c.gle/AOPyDKS0g4WI2o0grNrxc-4RDSBbRj2CvTKqG_Kmyg2Fnw1AhPqz6FPW-zU_Fx6IgQC-VGmilLlBl_1mcGkBjDEn08B5MKCx4bhqtJyVmsFOC4DHgj3zN9ykXrcIpiqbJYsRogTIkOMEmrtzRNOjoH8XYyHi69PxOj_nasInpYhvisaRpvfGh5UILIWvdO482KrkxMVDqigANy_6cnTGnCO2P1al8kdN851LHy6NRgAjBuhsQmUleCgwz1zzk6jt8FgPL7l8gjWMC2Ghpxm0K-jJjoeIPsmpdkwZ8YbQVQLuA9szRC0Vq1QBCe3FnMVD9fy6WmBfqGHKHc-cSIFtVD0dkoL3j6fJQMvOYt99Tbz7BhkqPvP48EXJPoYRe-6oAQdJKEXm4IfcGdKGuoz5RmDxfMgx1ORYiFbiefMs2lKMmyISYhPsmv-xmJgor1O6kr8To_gXKhMnvmVJBZ5R2GAriLs), but they should help make it easier for you to understand what to expect from Google — and what we expect from you — as you use our services.

You can review the [new terms here](https://c.gle/AOPyDKTLJL7WMP_-hBKNyVmswOLZuAti0xqGceKRW20Hj9R-E-VRyFUvYyjgIGRiEaqdJWu6-yMmdOFNbqjLzELrkTr8NYtKi-fo0jtDHntjzZzCWvrF_3MiUuRNMVavwlBeDUckGn99YjY-zV8golWeHrlmGStRf_f2XIsDdZ_x4WxVRk587JM8FoLYZSyw87zBQ3So41dYK-MMw2v7rwRZ9vPyW4JBRZYXmeCfVtIAEOLmiIxqOZPBkcySYFpRmHmKwlgGND2TgY23rPJMjCo1YbiGxYTJOVGM3yLki0RTOJwIEdem51iuqnfSzeH_oD4B-hThpHaJl9wyCP6aA7GebXW3uL6hhvye4PPPal9-v1m23gcVt3Mkcapl6lr_krGwwnrv43XvL9LXxhFYvhqxgmvarQFKPwmOAEArqjq6aduGpkgEkaJN2bJiyoUW). If you’re based in the European Economic Area (EEA) or Switzerland, we’ve also provided a [summary of the key changes to the EEA version of our terms](https://c.gle/AOPyDKRJnyq7tkwRPwedF_Uw1BkTeS98PQtF6kUtgizM5TTQS7cP5kpJXyu9YxZBNzj18_BougqGkUfItL28nN5LgOh3U6T3xsRooqK7rJmHlAqFdB7_-uagZKVMpUGrnMOu964e6KPaJLX2lTcdn_fGeqIpT_4NIVcncZ1xWuEyMQ09yNmXXllz10lvkzKn-o1tCKkeSirCFzNi2Ys9kW75jBybETtEhUA4jPhXwTvxiudcHP39eLcVXhCC0LY3cJOrNS7oSEmPolMvH0dgMCVYwb__DWjcgSuLnai5FjucOZjkVZRvsA-O-rpVsURjYqx74zb2U3pVdQL3t-P3f8kD_c4V0LoQzFvIhMclh0PZQvVxY8Ii08IraG0WlmkMMetLiU7GK2w_xsWkgQ0zfR2djqMSMuuVU6R5SPbA8VhrVlapg-jw3Qldks-aUqcdpwo).

At a glance, here’s what this update means for you:

- **In general:**
- We added a section to help you better understand why our services may access the internet when not actively engaged, to encourage you to check your Internet service plan and your device and network settings, as each of those may affect your costs.
- We updated and clarified our _Settling disputes, governing law, and courts_ section.
- We make it clearer how various sections in our terms relate to each other.
- **If you’re based in the EEA:**
- In addition to the changes in the _In general_ section, we updated various sections to reflect the latest EEA laws and regulations that apply to our services, including:
- Google’s obligation to make legally-required updates to our digital content, services, and goods.
- A new, online “withdrawal button” in the _EEA instructions on withdrawal_ section.
- We also removed the _Handling requests for your data_ section, because we’re centralizing our data disclosure language on our [main data disclosure policy page](https://c.gle/AOPyDKQjQsiq0zjhtca0vbG5DXSxoXGR6RISmEdRjIT7oIU66MG11yziLJdgkXHNN6zQItkv61sdwvDYZ2fmb8ke2fjN5JTAw3M3zUJFTrp4uWDDk18y0gx3nR6be8LSpmuKUd8pc3X012lV0HbQjxrUISepnCK96vh4_3M2fbxUWmoNMpXaOKrxJYa8I8d3GOhXvB8mhnYoRSxmY-PbCwu1e_ZeBq29dJbpEzRVN4HYL4LdQVtNpeMPwmXqpLY6wnnsmHEi32VcmZhI_nVB59ohpp9a4JGFhtSupodAab2cgSNl_Ovg9veS_b4Fp-9VXLaHQ1Yl5ca47gWZxWBB6HReMbVtWV90AGcwjO_41G9ASHelfMwMbX3F27VNuy43eqtk6_YaOdiHW7BcpAFEO6QFe57w9KGLK79NN7NGA5rDI0VI92ca90dnAS43FA5nqIDoldE51iarAcJ6gl5YkOaREDPpFbzdifWfwA).
- **If you’re based outside the EEA:**
- In addition to the changes in the _In general_ section, we added new disclosures and disclaimers, including ones about AI outputs.
- If you’re based in India, we also added new reporting language about our obligations if you violate applicable law.

If you’re a parent or guardian, and you allow your child to use the services, please review the updates to our terms with your child and help them decide whether they need to make any changes to their account. Please remember that these terms apply to you and you’re responsible for your child’s activity on the services.

If you don’t agree to the new terms, you should remove [your content](https://c.gle/AOPyDKRmNFFLjkqumldOlyG-W0j2KSsoN2Kryo8YRjWWweDSf9pxQYdNkfw_2MwxYBhA8j5GYdjcTlCn75vhTg_xuEYBJYEF34847MQyRvwflnDZuyrplGIlH3A4NXrPVjBhNnCVrKPveL0VHP96SOuloDthm61h2A8EX5vohdvQV_CtZLqNuFi0bpvapsLw4wjkqR9WITUO96IxAijspOjhMYEZerg3vUEtYiSyJ9oVowaZyY217DXiu9V7LvYs2MpYw_FVi_jAviiuumLTnX9_HvXck-4rSIbxG6dNR-xDUaFgOwKPl7447h8Mhsmn44KgzhIiVINVzP2WhHC44BlJYGAI02v7QbhkihH9E9U7XZ7ek9JYZq7g4e_-_B5uwJ9VDKEjP3rZWDQed1aCOmle8wAVPMtwZ-ddiUk-tC9PhIjnLDF6TDml4hNzsgJ-8IlQIYeNtuemJbwosIlYwBUgGhXYv1wMHU1N56_iKh2u07pYjfWXig_B5Wsutz3D0xxNvNp9iojR6mnH) and stop using the services. You can also end your relationship with us at any time, without penalty, by [closing your Google Account](https://c.gle/AOPyDKTJ8XHQqSUDffehySgJJ4HE8KXlT1-rkQnVADUml0OccTZWozqTyop58CWVk_rJNLuPdLo8BCUmk82C85TZCk9RDfBubhA6RqY8I8ODxXeUGdvfNoNAuMdIrRppt-Ruj-a8ac9JQOySqiqzCZTRX-ebC1iAq5Nq_0fYtaFt16pgSxSc4gKPP_rHRqpmXYKh4LZjs8inJMWMpC6VLeY2Nel8Bc_15kX2y3GrExQemqTwo8JsBzvvrdQHJbTCyQBauRw3v-VoKVeFg5ZEYn4ueFqJd2trMM8wQWQ2jlRl0j3F9_lVEEo_KT9evYDgbZuuM8GFwOf-j4LQRxYkrvBAdSMFygjVW4xLMzjzVrOucLwBTt6R0VHAl2DG_5uYVeGMdHC-5qduNiNMvC3dqUUzfGHfjNGXQmM2bUf5h_hM7ck4UedNiWGYGIrSUrob7zxyReac55xmnkKn7TZ9rYGxzJI).

Thank you for using Google services!

![](https://ci3.googleusercontent.com/meips/ADKq_Na_BBdWw4xSS1_7W0tRI-DubxDZ-zMFzjRzsAmvUiqb-6gL7Jet5x7E0yEggz3waGJpU7WGwrwsKD6WnXyjJDfHE6ceVQ6TY7Dknt9OK4MdcewBpTNfNIxYzJ_R=s0-d-e1-ft#http://services.google.com/fh/files/emails/updated_google_logo_new.png)

blocks.text:
![Google](https://www.gstatic.com/images/branding/googlelogo/2x/googlelogo_color_74x24dp.png)

You allowed composer access to some of your Google Account data

![](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVyHe8K42Y9v-hFJi7qPc61haUnfu4awlVp8glHGOebv6yaQ=s96-c)

dima.dxos@gmail.com

If you didn’t allow composer access to some of your Google Account data, someone else may be trying to access your Google Account data.

Take a moment now to check your account activity and secure your account.

[Check activity](https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=dima.dxos@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/alert/nt/1782739175000?rfn%3D127%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-9179029083448337189%26et%3D0)

To make changes at any time to the access that composer has to your data, go to your [Google Account](https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=dima.dxos@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/connections/overview/AcbYNTc79NoOylUQYNwmIkS9EzyoGTbHmOJCHeXg01mp4qztv9Na0kw_ihIUUNSXd338KqZYlhT14p3rs5kZ1eqfPOQ?utm_source%3Dsec_alert%26utm_medium%3Demail_notification%26force_all%3Dtrue)

You can also see security activity at
[https://myaccount.google.com/notifications](https://myaccount.google.com/notifications)

You received this email to let you know about important changes to your Google Account and services.

© 2026 Google Ireland Ltd., Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland
